description: Style Note The luxe comfort and rugged styling of woodland's shoes are now replicated in its sandals. Wear these with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style. Product Details Black sandals, straps across the forefoot and back heel to lock the foot in place, criss cross straps across the midfoot, click buckle closure for ankle straps to offer a customised Fit, suede cushioned footbed, outsole with nubs and lugs for grip and traction Material and Care Nubuk, TPR Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
